RA-L-PH/jmh.oneLineSummary: A minimal React template setup with Vite, HMR, and ESLint rules

coreFeatures.title: React Compiler
coreFeatures.implementation: The React Compiler is enabled/disabled depending on the template, impacting Vite dev & build performances. It can be installed and configured according to the provided documentation.

coreFeatures.title: Fast Refresh
coreFeatures.implementation: Fast Refresh is enabled using either Babel or SWC, depending on the chosen plugin (@vitejs/plugin-react or @vitejs/plugin-react-swc).

coreFeatures.title: ESLint Configuration
coreFeatures.implementation: The template includes basic ESLint rules, and recommends using TypeScript with type-aware lint rules enabled for production applications. The TS template provides guidance on integrating TypeScript and typescript-eslint.
